notes: Cannon Companion pp.78-84. Cost = DP × 8 nuyen when modifying a stock weapon. Availability uses the Installation TN as the Availability target number. FCU marked (r) only costs FCU when permanently built in.

categories.name: Cosmetic
categories.description: Appearance changes only — no effect on weapon performance.

categories.name: Internal Accessory
categories.description: Structural changes that alter internal components of the firearm.

mods.name: Custom Finish
mods.description: Gold/silver/nickel/chrome plating, ivory handles, dyed frames, or other cosmetic embellishments. Not compatible with Ceramic Components.
mods.notes: Appearance only. Incompatible with Ceramic Components option.

mods.name: Embossing / Engraving
mods.description: A specific design or phrase etched into the weapon.
mods.notes: Appearance only.

mods.name: Gas Vent II
mods.description: Barrel gas-venting system that compensates for recoil. Provides 2 points of Recoil Compensation; reduces Concealability by 1 (barrel protrusion).
mods.notes: See SR3 p.280 for full rules.

mods.name: Gas Vent III
mods.description: Enhanced barrel gas-venting system. Provides 3 points of Recoil Compensation; reduces Concealability by 2.
mods.notes: See SR3 p.280 for full rules.

mods.name: Gas Vent IV
mods.description: Top-tier barrel gas-venting system. Provides 4 points of Recoil Compensation; reduces Concealability by 2. See CC p.34.
mods.notes: See CC p.34 for full rules.

mods.name: Safe Target System
mods.description: Biometric scanner that engages the safety if the weapon is pointed within 2m of a wearer with a compatible Safe Target beacon (Rating test vs TN 5). See CC p.33.
mods.notes: Weapon cannot fire within 2m of a beacon wearer if system test succeeds.

mods.name: Secondary Weapon
mods.description: Hidden weapon triggered when an unauthorized palmprint is detected. Choose: handle spikes (6M Physical), electroshock (6S Stun), or chemical release (1 dose, 1m radius). Requires Biometric Safety. 3 uses before reload.
mods.notes: Requires Biometric Safety mod. Resisted by Body only (no Combat Pool). 3 uses.

mods.name: Smartgun System (Internal)
mods.description: Built-in smartlink targeting system. Standard: −2 TN when used with smartlink cyberware. Smartlink-2: additional bonuses (see M&M p.31). Incompatible with laser sights and imaging scopes.
mods.notes: −2 TN (standard) or further bonus (smartlink-2) when linked to compatible cyberware. Incompatible with Laser Sight and Imaging Systems.
mods.restrictions: Incompatible with Laser Sight and Imaging Systems

mods.name: Voice Activation
mods.description: Fires the weapon when it 'hears' a pre-programmed phrase from a recognized voice. Requires an internal smartgun system. Exact effects at GM discretion.
mods.notes: Requires Internal Smartgun System. GM adjudicates exact combat effects.

mods.name: Biometric Safety
mods.description: Scans the palmprint of anyone gripping the weapon. If the print does not match, the safety remains locked and the gun cannot fire. See CC p.32.
mods.notes: Weapon cannot be fired by unauthorized users.

mods.name: Bipod
mods.description: Folding two-legged underbarrel brace. Provides 2 points of Recoil Compensation when deployed. Extending requires a Simple Action; user must be braced (prone or kneeling). Not usable on SMGs.
mods.notes: 2 RC only when deployed (Simple Action to extend). Cannot be used on SMGs.

mods.name: Extended Clip
mods.description: Large-capacity clip that increases the weapon's ammo capacity. Maximum 50 rounds. Cost and DP are per round added.
mods.notes: Specify number of rounds added (max 50 total). Cost = 8 nuyen × rounds added.
mods.restrictions: Clip-fed firearms only. Maximum 50 rounds total.

mods.name: Foregrip
mods.description: Small underbarrel pistol grip at the front of the weapon. Provides 1 point of Recoil Compensation when used two-handed. See CC p.34.
mods.notes: 1 RC when used two-handed.

mods.name: Full-Auto Conversion
mods.description: Converts a BF-capable machine pistol or SMG to fire full-auto instead (SA/BF → SA/FA). Burst fire mode is lost. Whenever fired in FA, adds +1 to the recoil modifier (weapon is not designed for the stress).
mods.notes: +1 recoil modifier on every FA burst. BF mode no longer available.
mods.restrictions: BF-capable machine pistols and SMGs only

mods.name: Imaging System
mods.description: Optical scope with one or more imaging modes. Types may be combined (additive FCU/DP). Incompatible with smartlink systems.
mods.notes: See SR3 p.280 for rules. Incompatible with smartgun systems.
mods.restrictions: Incompatible with Laser Sight and Smartgun Systems

mods.name: Laser Sight
mods.description: Mounts a laser aiming device on the weapon. Provides −1 TN modifier when used. Incompatible with smartlink systems and imaging scopes. See SR3 p.281.
mods.notes: −1 TN. Incompatible with smartgun systems and imaging scopes.
mods.restrictions: Incompatible with Smartgun Systems and Imaging Systems

mods.name: Laser Target Designator
mods.description: Marks targets with an infrared laser so weapons with seeker systems can home in on the reflected energy. See CC p.35. Smoke doubles all Spotting Test modifiers.
mods.notes: Provides targeting data for seeker munitions. Smoke doubles Spotting Test modifiers.

mods.name: Personalized Grip
mods.description: Reshapes the handle and contours to fit one specific user's hands and stance. That user gains −1 to all recoil modifiers. Other users receive no bonus or penalty.
mods.notes: Bonus applies to the designated owner only. Other users get no bonus or penalty.

mods.name: Range Finder
mods.description: Estimates range to target and feeds data through a smartgun link. When used with a Smartlink-2: −1 TN at Long range, −2 TN at Extreme range. Incompatible with imaging systems. See CC p.34.
mods.notes: Requires smartgun link. −1 TN at Long range, −2 TN at Extreme range (Smartlink-2 only). Not cumulative with imaging magnification modifiers.
mods.restrictions: Incompatible with Imaging Systems; requires Smartlink-2 for range bonus

mods.name: Remove Safety
mods.description: Removes the safety mechanism. A character with a ready (loaded) weapon without a safety may fire in a surprise situation if they equal or beat the opponent's successes. Downside: if the loaded weapon takes a hard blow it may discharge accidentally (GM discretion).
mods.notes: May fire in surprise situations. Risk of accidental discharge from impacts (GM discretion).

mods.name: Remove Trigger
mods.description: Removes the trigger entirely; weapon fires only via smartlink command. Only a character with a compatible smartlink can fire the weapon.
mods.notes: Weapon cannot be fired without a compatible smartlink. Requires Internal Smartgun System.

mods.name: Sawed-Off Shotgun Barrel
mods.description: Cuts down the shotgun barrel. Increases Concealability by 2, reduces Power by 1, and reduces range to heavy pistol range tables. Choke setting cannot exceed 6. Done with a kit adds +1 TN to all shots (barrel not recalibrated); shop eliminates this penalty.
mods.notes: Uses heavy pistol range. Choke max 6. Kit install: +1 TN on all shots (shop avoids this).

mods.name: Shock / Hip Pads
mods.description: Shock-absorbing shoulder or hip pads mounted on the weapon. Provides 1 point of Recoil Compensation. Shock pads: rifles, shotguns, machine guns, assault cannons. Hip pads: trolls carrying heavy weapons (CC p.34).
mods.notes: Shock pads for rifles/shotguns/MGs/ACs. Hip pads for troll heavy weapon users.
mods.restrictions: Shock pads: rifles, shotguns, machine guns, assault cannons only

mods.name: Silencer
mods.description: Reduces sound and muzzle flash. Usable only with single-shot (SS) or semi-automatic (SA) modes. Cannot be used on cylinder-fed firearms. See SR3 p.281.
mods.notes: Reduces sound/flash. SS and SA modes only. Not for cylinder-fed guns.
mods.restrictions: SS/SA modes only. Not for cylinder-fed firearms.

mods.name: Smartgun System (External)
mods.description: External clip-on smartlink targeting system, easily attached and removed. Standard: −2 TN when used with smartlink cyberware. Smartlink-2: additional bonuses. Incompatible with laser sights and imaging scopes.
mods.notes: −2 TN (standard) or further bonus (smartlink-2) when linked to compatible cyberware. Incompatible with Laser Sight and Imaging Systems.
mods.restrictions: Incompatible with Laser Sight and Imaging Systems

mods.name: Sound Suppressor
mods.description: Reduces sound and flash for burst-fire and full-auto modes only. Cannot be used with SS or SA modes. See SR3 p.281.
mods.notes: BF and FA modes only. Incompatible with Silencer.

mods.name: Stock (Folding)
mods.description: Adds a folding stock to the weapon. Provides 1 point of Recoil Compensation when unfolded. When unfolded, also reduces Concealability by 1. Not available for rifles or shotguns.
mods.notes: Conceal penalty and RC bonus only apply when stock is unfolded. Folded: no bonus or penalty.

mods.name: Stock (Rigid)
mods.description: Adds a rigid stock to the weapon. Provides 1 point of Recoil Compensation. Reduces Concealability by 1 permanently. Not available for rifles or shotguns.
mods.notes: Permanent −1 Conceal.

mods.name: Tripod
mods.description: Large three-legged underbarrel brace. Provides 6 points of Recoil Compensation. Machine guns and assault cannons only. Cannot be concealed. Setting up takes a Simple Action; weapon must be fired from prone or sitting position.
mods.notes: Cannot be concealed. Setup: Simple Action. Must be prone or sitting to fire. MGs and ACs only.
mods.restrictions: Machine guns and assault cannons only

mods.name: Ultrasound Sight
mods.description: Maps surroundings with coded sound pulses. Reduces all targeting modifiers from visibility or lighting by half (round up) when in use. See SR3 p.282.
mods.notes: Halves all TN modifiers from visibility/lighting conditions (round up).

mods.name: Underbarrel Weapon
mods.description: Attaches a secondary weapon to the underbarrel of a rifle-sized or larger weapon. Options: bayonet (CC p.32), grenade launcher (SR3 p.279), grapple gun (CC p.33), or flamethrower nozzle (CC p.30).
mods.notes: Rifle-sized or larger only. Each option adds weight (see below) and is a separate weapon system.

mods.name: Underbarrel Weight
mods.description: A weighted attachment on the underbarrel that reduces muzzle climb. Provides 1 point of Recoil Compensation. See CC p.34.
mods.notes: 1 RC.
